item.title: Quick reminder of nonsense that comes around every pride
item.description:
Quick reminder of nonsense that comes around every pride. There is no queer liberation, without collective liberation.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They keep doing this and it keeps being weird
item.description:
They keep doing this and it keeps being weird. Who are you to tell me what my future wife will care about who are you to tell me that I only have one future or that I’ll have a wife at all? It’s just odd and it’s harmful.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Encirclement is literally a strategy described by kissenger
item.description:
Encirclement is literally a strategy described by kissenger

item.title: The idea that it is somehow a crime to be offended when you shouldn’t be offended while learning a significant political lesson ...
item.description:
The idea that it is somehow a crime to be offended when you shouldn’t be offended while learning a significant political lesson from it is a right wing psy op



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is a shorter discussion of leftist engagement with imperial systems but point is, we ain’t telling u to vote, we r just foc...
item.description:
This is a shorter discussion of leftist engagement with imperial systems but point is, we ain’t telling u to vote, we r just focusing on what chooses who you GET to vote for



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
